name: Extend tech/gha-hardening with repo-specific context (workflow inventory + @claude surface + PR-gate) [F-116]
description: tech/gha-hardening covers generic GHA hardening but lacks the repo-specific workflow inventory, the @claude agent-invocation threat surface, and the PR-review-gate requirements.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a '## Repo-specific context' section to .agents/skills/tech/gha-hardening/SKILL.md (sync via pnpm sync-skills), ~50 lines, citing the generic skill it sits in: (1) a 6+-entry workflow inventory with which carry secrets / id-token:write / run untrusted-or-fork code; (2) the claude-code-review.yml @claude agent-invocation threat model (PR title/author interpolated into the prompt; the F-119/F-127 scope-leak pattern); (3) PR review-gate security (F-132 unauthenticated-comment-as-verdict); (4) the mobile-maestro single-layer gate fragility (F-154). In-place extend (one skill load, not two). DoD: human review of inventory accuracy before merge.
bodyText:
Reduce-and-extend (in place)
Extend tech/gha-hardening rather than create a second skill (simpler discovery — one load). The generic skill is near-complete for standard attack classes; the addendum is the repo's own workflow surface. Cross-refs to the live PRG-10 GHA findings (F-119/F-127/F-132/F-154) for the concrete patterns.
Note
Workflow-inventory accuracy is review-sensitive — operator reviews before merge.
